transcript.clean_text: well we did a fond farewell to the netherlands fondest memories of all for sam bennett two in a row after the team time trial bennett in charge of the green jersey competition the man chasing him hard mads pedersen this is going to rage on sam doubling up wearing green today in the red eduardo afini starring lavuelte in spain the jersey that had been shared amongst jumbo visma after their team time trial saw hesik go into it first and then mike turnerson after finishing fourth on stage two who then could deny them and would the stage hunters have their fun that was the big question during our philippe the world champion looking to be returning to form was a red hot favorite for the day and quite a terrain to play with stage four of lavuenta modest climb out of the back door would probably generate a breakaway and that's precisely what happened two categorized climbs along the way but a whole host of other peaks including a nasty ramp towards the end alexey lucenko a strong rider started the move early he was in the break along with alessandro dimachi bridging over to them james shaw of education easy post theseness of lotta sadao okamika of burgos bh and john buu of uskatel well with the category two tests up for grabs early on this was a chance for one of the breakaway to go into the coconut jersey it was bull that took that opportunity mission accomplished he would indeed be in the polka dots at the end of this day great result for oscar oscary coming home while the roads of the basque country are tested we knew that three remain from the break that tenko shaw and demarchy as we headed to the intermediate sprint and in fact with the gap closing rapidly they effectively fell over the line before the pack caught them james sure it was that picked up the most points from the intermediate sprint but there were some up for grabs behind the trio of breakers it was a battle between sam bennett and mads pedersen that's person crossing the line just in front of sam bennett narrowing the gap between them while sam bennett had to stop for a slow puncture once that was changed he was too far back to be part of the action late on reduced sprinting points up for grabs at the line would matt pedersen be up there to try and snap us up but our philippe was busy thinking about mountains points as well and just to make sure that everyone knows who's boss because roglic pushed on as well to deny the frenchman the day wasn't over it all came down to get more climbing and essentially a climbing sprint very very much a punchy finale so who would try coming into the last kilometer the flam rouge was passed and so were the chances of many it had been a tough pace throughout the entire day and the proper grind it was late on kenny osan for trex freddo set off with matt pedersen in his wheel but primos roglic launched pedersen decided to follow and who on earth else would be there victory basher was doing a battle with enric mass from movie star but roglich it was that had a gap at the line all credits to matt pedersen for a strong second place but with reduced sprinters points available at the line on this lumpy day and sam bennett stays in green roglich though is in red with this victory pedestal mass pressure finishing behind it sivikov rounding out the top five good performance as well from ben o'connor roglich has practically owned this race for the last three seasons so it looks like he continues to do so 13 seconds is his gap on cepcus ethan hayter in the young riders jersey did recover and finished well on the day he's 26 seconds in the rears roglich though well will he seed the jersey there's a possibility if a breakaway that is not too much of a threat goes up the road but for now he looks great in red and this is the course that awaits us on the run to bilbao it's a longer day 187 kilometers in total and plenty of climbing area a loop circuit at the very end will bring us home two calorie two tests on the back of three category threes it's going to be tough all of those climbs compressed into the latter part of the stage we can't wait
